heading: Today
text: Gradual clearing this morning, becoming mostly sunny south, mixed with clouds north this afternoon.  Milder.  Highs in the 40s, near 40 far north, and 50 in the warmer valleys south.  Winds light, mainly west up to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear, with some clouds near and north of the Quebec border late.  Some patches of river valley fog or freezing fog.  Lows in the 20s, some upper teens in the cold spots.  Winds light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Sunshine mixing with increasing clouds.  A rising chance of rain in the afternoon west and south of I-89.  Highs in the 40s, a few upper 30s far north.  Winds light, becoming north up to 10 mph.
